name: part_003
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: Fuwawa, Mococo, and Calliope Mori perform a high-energy song together on stage with vibrant visuals and water guns.
scenes.song_name: I Like It! I Like It!

scenes.description: A short MC segment where Calliope Mori praises FuwaMoco's performance before they transition to their next song.
Fuwawa and Mococo perform a cover of 'Jo J'aime ★ Jo J'aime', featuring idol-style choreography and pastel aesthetics.
